scope: Milestone B: profile snapshot + events + rollback + inferred state machine

tasks.title: Define profile_snapshot schema
tasks.description: Define/extend schema for snapshot: pre_context + skills(asserted/inferred) + version + updated_at.
tasks.success_criteria: Snapshot schema supports required fields and is forward compatible.

tasks.title: Define profile_events types + payload catalog
tasks.description: Specify event types and payload shapes; finalize storage format decision.
tasks.success_criteria: Event catalog complete enough to implement write + fold + rollback + inferred state machine.

tasks.title: Implement append_event + versioning strategy
tasks.description: Implement append-only event write with locking, version assignment, and atomic append (format per DEC-101).
tasks.success_criteria: Events are immutable and versioned; concurrent appends are safe.

tasks.title: Implement fold/rebuild snapshot (target_version supported)
tasks.description: Implement deterministic fold and rebuild snapshot; support building snapshot at target_version.
tasks.success_criteria: Idempotent rebuild produces identical snapshot for same event stream.

tasks.title: Implement inferred state machine + user confirm/reject
tasks.description: Implement inferred skills lifecycle: proposed/confirmed/rejected/superseded; confirmed only via user explicit action; cooldown+new evidence for re-propose.
tasks.success_criteria: State transitions are enforced and fully evented; rollback combinations work; tests are deterministic.

tasks.title: Implement rollback_to_version
tasks.description: Implement rollback by appending ROLLBACK_TO_VERSION and rebuilding snapshot view; no event deletion.
tasks.success_criteria: Rollback produces correct view and remains auditable.

tasks.title: Metrics + explainability closure
tasks.description: Add evidence/provenance enforcement and metrics emission for events/rebuild/inferred/rollback.
tasks.success_criteria: Every inferred has evidence/provenance minimum closure; observability hooks exist.

decisions: DEC-101: events storage format = JSONL per profile (.workflow/learn/profiles/events/{profileId}.ndjson)
DEC-102: inferred state machine + cooldown/new evidence gating + CCW_NOW_ISO time injection
notes.iteration_focus: Implement TASK-005 inferred state machine end-to-end (events + fold + CLI + tests).
